title: AI Mania Is Eviscerating Global Decision-Making
content: Article URL: https://ludic.mataroa.blog/blog/ai-mania-is-eviscerating-global-decision-making/#fnref:3 Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48964185 Points: 207 # Comments: 79
summary: 文章批评当前全球对AI的狂热导致决策质量严重下降，指出许多组织盲目跟风部署AI，忽视实际需求和潜在风险，从而损害了理性决策和长期利益。
highlights: AI Mania Is Eviscerating Global Decision-Making
盲目跟风AI部署正在破坏全球决策过程
忽视实际需求和潜在风险导致决策质量下降

title: NYC may require landlords and realtors to disclose the use of AI in listings
content: Article URL: https://petapixel.com/2026/07/16/mayor-mamdani-says-landlords-cant-secretly-use-ai-images-to-advertise-properties/ Comments URL: https://news.ycombinator.com/item?id=48962983 Points: 470 # Comments: 206
summary: 纽约市拟要求房东和中介在房源广告中披露AI使用情况，禁止秘密使用AI图像宣传房产。

title: Newer Models, Same Advantage
summary: 文章探讨了新一代AI模型如何延续并强化了早期模型的优势，分析了技术进步带来的性能提升和实际应用中的持续领先地位。
highlights: Newer models maintain the same core advantages as their predecessors while improving efficiency.
The evolution of AI architectures continues to leverage foundational strengths for better outcomes.
Benchmark results show consistent superiority across generations of models.
